## koem-cli label add

Add a new label

### Synopsis

Add a new label to your configuration with a name and port range.
	
This command allows you to add a new label to your configuration file.
The label will be added with a name and port range.

```
koem-cli label add [name] [port-range] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help            help for add
  -p, --ports strings   Port range for the label
```
